data.title: Hawthorn Resources Releases Half-Year Financial Report
data.description:
Hawthorn Resources Limited ( (AU:HAW) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Hawthorn Resources Limited has released its financial report for the half-year ending December 31, 2024. The report provides insights into the company’s financial performance, including consolidated statements of profit or loss, financial position, cash flows, and changes in equity. This financial disclosure is crucial for stakeholders to assess the company’s operational efficiency and strategic positioning in the mining sector.

More about Hawthorn Resources Limited

Hawthorn Resources Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources. The company is engaged in identifying and exploiting mineral deposits, with a market focus on expanding its resource base and enhancing shareholder value.

data.title: Safran Announces Early Redemption of 2028 Convertible Bonds
data.description:
SAFRAN SA ( (FR:SAF) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Safran has announced an early redemption of its 2028 OCEANEs convertible bonds, initially due in 2028, to be redeemed at par value on 1 April 2025. Bondholders have until 21 March 2025 to exercise their conversion rights, with 1,933,253 bonds already converted and 2,102,348 still outstanding. This move could impact Safran’s financial strategy and stakeholder interests.

More about SAFRAN SA

Safran is an international high-technology group operating in the aviation, defense, and space markets, focusing on making air transport more environmentally friendly, comfortable, and accessible. With a global presence, Safran employs 100,000 people and achieved sales of 27.3 billion euros in 2024. The company holds leadership positions in its core markets and is committed to research and development to support its environmental priorities. Safran is listed on the Euronext Paris stock exchange and is part of the CAC 40 and Euro Stoxx 50 indices.

YTD Price Performance: 18.61%

Average Trading Volume: 228,496

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: €99.44B

data.title: Suncorp Group Director Increases Shareholding
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Suncorp Group ( (AU:SUN) ).

Suncorp Group Limited has announced a change in the director’s interest, specifically involving Ian Hammond. On March 12, 2025, Hammond acquired 10,500 ordinary shares, increasing his total holdings to 47,940 shares. This transaction was conducted on the market, reflecting Hammond’s continued investment in the company, which may signal confidence in Suncorp’s future performance.

More about Suncorp Group

Suncorp Group Limited operates in the financial services industry, offering a range of products and services including banking, insurance, and wealth management. The company focuses on providing comprehensive financial solutions to its customers in Australia and New Zealand.

data.title: Aéroports de Paris Announces €1 Billion Bond Issuance and Tender Offer
data.description:
Aeroports de Paris ADP ( (FR:ADP) ) has provided an update.

Aéroports de Paris SA announced a dual tranche bond issuance totaling 1 billion euros, with each tranche maturing in 8 and 11 years, respectively. Concurrently, the company launched a tender offer for its 2020 bonds, aiming to manage its debt profile dynamically. The tender offer is conditional on the settlement of the new bonds and involves a maximum acceptance amount of 250 million euros, subject to the company’s discretion. These financial maneuvers are part of ADP’s strategy to balance its bond maturity profile, impacting its financial operations and stakeholder interests.

More about Aeroports de Paris ADP

Groupe ADP, operating as Aéroports de Paris, is a leading company in the aviation industry that designs and operates airports in Paris and globally. In 2024, it managed 26 airports, welcoming nearly 364 million passengers, including over 103 million in the Paris region. The company focuses on high service standards, performance, and decarbonization, transforming airports into multi-energy, multi-modal hubs. It has strategic partnerships with TAV Airports and GMR Airports, enhancing its global presence. In 2024, Groupe ADP reported a revenue of €6,158 million and a net income of €342 million.

YTD Price Performance: -12.35%

Average Trading Volume: 49,143

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: €9.77B

data.title: eREX Co., Ltd. Secures Subsidy for Biomass Co-Firing Project in Vietnam
data.description:
eREX Co., Ltd. ( (JP:9517) ) has issued an announcement.

eREX Co., Ltd. has been selected to receive a subsidy for its biomass fuel co-firing test at coal-fired power plants in Vietnam, a move that aligns with Vietnam’s goal to become carbon neutral by 2050. This initiative supports Vietnam’s growing electricity demand and energy self-sufficiency while reinforcing eREX’s commitment to renewable energy and de-carbonization.

More about eREX Co., Ltd.

eREX Co., Ltd. operates in the renewable energy industry, focusing primarily on biomass power generation. The company aims to pioneer the new era of electric power with renewable energy at its core, contributing to a de-carbonized society both in Japan and internationally.

data.title: Zenith Energy Awaits Final Hearing in Legal Battle Against SMP Energies
data.description:
Zenith Energy ( (GB:ZEN) ) has issued an announcement.

Zenith Energy Ltd. has announced the final hearing for a legal claim by its subsidiary, Anglo African Oil & Gas Congo S.A.U, against SMP Energies, related to unsatisfactory drilling performance in the Tilapia oilfield. The claim, initially valued at $3.1 million and later increased to $9 million, seeks compensation for significant damages, including the inability to commence production activities. The case has been ongoing for about five years, with SMP’s attempts to delay proceedings being dismissed by the court. A final decision is expected within three months, and Zenith is optimistic about a favorable outcome.

More about Zenith Energy

Zenith Energy Ltd. is an independent energy company with operations in North Africa, the US, and Europe. It focuses on energy production, exploration, and development, particularly in revenue-generating assets and low-risk exploration opportunities. The company is listed on multiple stock exchanges, including the London Stock Exchange, Oslo Stock Exchange, and the OTC Pink Markets.

YTD Price Performance: 73.68%

Average Trading Volume: 2,912,673

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: £20.31M

data.title: Coca-Cola Europacific Partners Announces Director Retirement
data.description:
An announcement from Coca-Cola Europacific Partners ( (CCEP) ) is now available.

Coca-Cola Europacific Partners announced the retirement of Dagmar Kollmann as Non-executive Director, effective after the Annual General Meeting in May 2025. Kollmann’s extensive experience in various executive roles and her contribution to the acquisition of the Philippines business have been pivotal for the company. The Nomination Committee is reviewing the Board’s composition following her departure.

More about Coca-Cola Europacific Partners

Coca-Cola Europacific Partners is a leading consumer goods company that produces, distributes, and sells popular beverage brands. It serves nearly 600 million consumers and supports over 4 million customers across 31 countries, leveraging its multinational scale and local expertise.

data.title: Activia Properties Secures 6 Billion Yen Loan for Debt Refinancing
data.description:
Activia Properties ( (JP:3279) ) has shared an update.

Activia Properties Inc. has announced a new borrowing arrangement totaling 6 billion yen to refinance an existing long-term debt due on March 21, 2025. This strategic financial move aims to manage its debt obligations effectively without altering the overall debt balance, maintaining its financial stability and operational continuity.

More about Activia Properties

Activia Properties Inc. operates in the real estate investment industry, focusing on managing and acquiring properties to generate income and capital appreciation. The company is managed by TLC REIT Management Inc., which oversees its strategic operations.
